title: Minimum Spanning Trees and Network Design · Mastery Check
summary: Connect sites at minimum build cost while explaining redundancy limits. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a minimum-network design and sensitivity brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use safe-edge cut arguments to justify minimum-spanning-tree choices.
Run Kruskal with deterministic edge ordering and disjoint-set cycle prevention.
Run Prim with frontier priorities and stale-entry handling.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Cut Property correctness-and-cost proof for this quiz task before implementing it.
